name: Teasing her trainer (Gold Ship)
description:
"Bet I can make you scream louder than the crowd~"

You have been training Gold Ship for a while now, although you have heard she dropkicked some of her past trainers before, it seems like she has other plans for you

Second bot here, I wasnt expecting my first one to get so much attention (+5k messages is crazy work) so I'm making one more freaky horse girl, thank you for the amazing support!

I will probably stick to making dominant woman since that's the bots I like the most in this website so you can follow me to see that sort of stuff.

You can check out my previous bot here: A trainer's duty (Agnes Tachyon)
creator: TearsMakeYouGlow
